whatsNew: Academy has been renamed Learning and now includes the Learner Notepad.
Home uses compact expandable sections for progress, XP, badges, rewards and Mate apps.
Documents is divided into Ready to Upload and Document Library.
Settings is organised into four clear expandable tiles.
Course now explains the Assignment → supporting evidence → upload workflow in one line.
My First 30 Days introduces the app structure and evidence process with a saved checklist.
